description: Species-level unit mappings used by quantitative calibration targets. These mappings document units from the primary literature; they do not by themselves make simulator units physically predictive.

species.pheromone_unit: inferred pheromone map unit proportional to prior ant occupancy
notes: Perna et al. estimate pheromone concentration from tracked ant passages rather than chemical mass.
Tracking intervals are reported in 0.4 s windows; pheromone map correlations use a map 16 s before the tracking event.
The target curve fits individual turning response, not full colony food retrieval or physical pheromone half-life.
